zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Cruwys於大約1327年出生在英國戴文可盧斯 莫爾哈德時，他的父親Sir Robert de Cruwys43歲，母親Isabella St Aubin45歲。他於大約1369年與Juliana Bromford在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他去世於1382年10月10日之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Cruwys于大约1327年出生在英国戴文可盧斯 莫爾哈德时，他的父亲Sir Robert de Cruwys43岁，母亲Isabella St Aubin45岁。他于大约1369年与Juliana Bromford在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他去世于1382年10月10日之前。

nameMeanings.name: Cruwys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cruse
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name probably from an unidentified place in Normandy named with Old French crues, crus, creus ‘hollow’. Creuse (in Somme, Picardy) and Cruys-Straëte (formerly in Flanders, now in the French département of Nord), which have the same etymology, are alternative possibilities but seem less likely on geographical and tenurial grounds.
English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English crus(e) ‘bold, fierce’, although the regular development would be to Crowse (rhyming with house).

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Cruwys was born about 1327, in Cruwys Morchard, Devon, England, his father, Sir Robert de Cruwys, was 43 and his mother, Isabella St Aubin, was 45. He married Juliana Bromford about 1369, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. He died before 10 October 1382.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Cruwys est né environ 1327, à Cruwys Morchard, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Cruwys, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Isabella St Aubin, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Juliana Bromford environ 1369, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé avant 10 octobre 1382.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Cruwys um 1327 in Cruwys Morchard, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert de Cruwys 43 und seine Mutter Isabella St Aubin 45. Er hat um 1369 in Devon, England, United Kingdom Juliana Bromford geheiratet. Er starb vor 10. Oktober 1382.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Cruwys è nato il circa 1327 nel Cruwys Morchard, Devon, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert de Cruwys, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Isabella St Aubin, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Juliana Bromford circa 1369, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì prima del 10 ottobre 1382.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Cruwysが約1327年にイギリスデボンクルウイス モーチャードで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Cruwysは43歳，母Isabella St Aubinは45歳であった。約1369年にイギリスイギリスデボンでJuliana Bromfordと結婚した。彼は1382年10月10日以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Cruwys(이)가 대략 1327년 영국 데폰 크루w이스 모르처드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Cruwys(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella St Aubin(은)는 45세였다. 그는 대략 1369년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Juliana Bromford(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1382년 10월 10일 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Cruwys nasceu aproximadamente 1327, em Cruwys Morchard, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert de Cruwys, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Isabella St Aubin, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Juliana Bromford aproximadamente 1369, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu antes 10 de outubro de 1382.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Cruwys родился около 1327 г. в местности крувис морчард, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Cruwys было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella St Aubin, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana Bromford около 1369 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер перед 10 октябрь 1382 г.

Se casó con Juliana Bromford aproximadamente 1369, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió antes de 10 de octubre de 1382.
